name: pantheon-audit
description: Multi-persona elite security audit plugin marketplace. Currently contains the PANTHEON plugin: 11 sub-agents, 12 phases, 35 deliverables (v4.0 BILLIONS-TIER).

plugins.name: pantheon
plugins.description: A multi-persona adversarially gated security audit workflow. Convenes eight elite auditor personas in twelve phases with adversarial gate, compliance auto-mapping to eighteen frameworks, and thirty-five auto-generated deliverables. Releases are signed with Sigstore Cosign v3; verify via cosign verify-blob (procedure in docs/installation.md Step 2) before installation.
